arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up vs Leicester in FA Cup fixture
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Man Utd play Leicester City in the FA Cup on Friday night and here's how our writers think they should start.

arts.ttl: Why Ruud van Nistelrooy left Manchester United after Ruben Amorim appointment
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim opted against keeping Ruud van Nistelrooy as he was joined by six backroom staff members at Man United.

arts.ttl: 'Until then' - Ruben Amorim teases Chido Obi-Martin first-team prospects at Manchester United
arts.sum: Chido Obi-Martin is only 17 but, as a prolific Man United striker, he could force his way into the first team squad this season.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim opens up on why he axed Ruud van Nistelrooy from coaching staff when he took Man United job ahead of reunion with Leicester boss
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim insists it was the right decision to leave Ruud van Nistelrooy out of his backroom team at Manchester United, but admits it hurts his pride to know the Dutchman has a better record than him.

arts.ttl: Former Man Utd and Barcelona star sentenced for Rolls-Royce drink driving
arts.sum: The 30-year-old recently joined Brazilian club Corinthians last summer so was not in court in person to hear the sentencing. A court in Monaco has sentenced Memphis Depay after the former Manchester United and Barcelona forward was caught drink driving last August.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Leicester
arts.sum: Manchester United are aiming to bounce back from their underwhelming defeat to Crystal Palace when they host Leicester City in the FA Cup fourth round on Friday night. GK: Altay Bayindir - Having proven Man Utd's saviour in the third round penalty shootout win at Arsenal, the deputy could be handed another start in between the sticks against a Leicester side struggling for goals.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim claims he 'could NOT' get through to Marcus Rashford at Man United - and admits forward did not 'play' or 'train' the way he wanted
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Amorim hadn't played Rashford for the last 13 games and even went so far as to say he would rather pick his 63-year-old goalkeeper coach than the England international.

arts.ttl: Man United boss Ruben Amorim insists he has the support of club's board and is 'not the slightest bit worried' about the sack amid his side's dismal season
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Amorim has struggled to change United's playing style and lost eight of his 19 games in charge ahead of Friday's FA Cup fourth-round clash with Leicester.

arts.ttl: Amorim: Rashford had to leave as he didn't adapt
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has said Marcus Rashford had to leave Manchester United because he couldn't get the forward to buy into his ideas.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim does not fear sack even if Manchester United’s slump worsens
arts.sum: Head coach has lost seven league games since his arrival Amorim: ‘I couldn’t get Rashford to see football how I do’ Ruben Amorim does not fear the sack even if Manchester United’s slump worsens under his watch, with the head coach sure of co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe’s support. United’s 2-0 defeat to Crystal Palace on Sunday was a seventh loss in 13 Premier League games under Amorim with the result leaving them in 13th place with a -6 goal difference. Continue reading...
